title: calappa mikaniana
intro: Calappa mikaniana, also known as the Pacific calappa or calappa tree, is a species of tree in the family Anacardiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Calappa mikaniana include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help reduce inflammation and protect the body from oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, Calappa mikaniana is often used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or topical applications to harness its medicinal properties.
